")[0] if ". " in our_take else our_take 532- first_sentence = " ".join(first_sentence.strip().split()) 533- if len(first_sentence) > 140: 534- cut = first_sentence[:140] 535- cut = cut.rsplit(" ", 1)[0] if " " in cut else cut 536- first_sentence = cut + "..." 537- if name and first_sentence: 538- evidence_lines.append(f"- {name} ({rating}; {evidence_type}) — {first_sentence}") 539- 540- evidence_block = "\n".join(evidence_lines) if evidence_lines else "(no evidence available)" 541- 542- prompt = f"""Generate a Priority Alignment Matrix (5-6 items) for this candidate. 543- 544-ROLE SNAPSHOT: 545-JOB: {', '.join(responsibilities[:4]) if responsibilities else 'Backend Engineer'} 546-TECH: {', '.join(tech_stack) if tech_stack else 'Not specified'} 547-SCORE: {overall_score}/100 548- 549-EVIDENCE (do not invent beyond this): 550-{evidence_block} 551- 552-SKILL LIST (for coverage): 553-STRONG: {', '.join([s.get('skill_name', '') for s in strong[:5]])} 554-WEAK/GAP: {', '.join([s.get('skill_name', '') for s in weak[:5]])} 555- 556-OUTPUT RULES: 557-- Produce 5-6 items 558-- verdict must be one of: Strong fit | Verify in meeting | More signal needed | Gap 559-- reason must be <= 110 characters 560-- reason must justify the verdict using EVIDENCE lines above, OR (for Verify/More signal needed/Gap) state what to confirm in 1 clause 561-- reason must include at least ONE short phrase copied from EVIDENCE (3–8 words) in quotes 562-- NO generic phrases like "core backend responsibilities" or "define tech stack" 563-- Forbidden words/phrases: responsibilities, role requirements, role scope, "maps closely" 564-- Do not invent company names, numbers, or projects not in EVIDENCE 565- 566-Respond with ONLY valid JSON: 567-[ 568- {{"need": "requirement", "verdict": "Strong fit|Verify in meeting|More signal needed|Gap", "reason": "brief justification", "verdict_class": "strong|verify|gap"}} 569-]""" 570- 571- try: 572- response = call_llm(prompt) 573- tradeoffs = parse_json_from_response(response) 574- 575- for t in tradeoffs: 576- verdict_lower = t.get("verdict", "").lower() 577- if "strong" in verdict_lower: 578- t["verdict_class"] = "strong" 579- elif "verify" in verdict_lower: 580- t["verdict_class"] = "verify" 581- else: 582- t["verdict_class"] = "gap" 583- 584- reason = (t.get("reason") or "").strip() 585- if len(reason) > 140: 586- cut = reason[:120] 587- cut = cut.rsplit(" ", 1)[0] if " " in cut else cut 588- t["reason"] = cut + "..." 589- 590- # Cleanup generic phrasing that hurts signal quality 591- import re 592- r = (t.get("reason") or "").strip() 593- r = re.sub(r'"[^"]*responsibilit[^"]*"', '"..."', r, flags=re.I) 594- r = re.sub(r'\bresponsibilit\w*\b', '', r, flags=re.I) 595- r = r.replace("maps closely", "").replace("role scope", "").replace("role requirements", "") 596- r = " ".join(r.split()) 597- t["reason"] = r 598- 599- return tradeoffs[:6] 600- 601- except Exception as e: 602- print(f"Warning: LLM tradeoff generation failed: {e}") 603- 604- def _clean_reason(text: str) -> str: 605- import re 606- t = " ".join((text or "").strip().split()) 607- t = re.sub(r"\bresponsibilit\w*\b", "", t, flags=re.I) 608- t = t.replace("maps closely", "").replace("role scope", "").replace("role requirements", "") 609- t = " ".join(t.split()) 610- if len(t) > 110: 611- cut = t[:110]
